evidence.observed: Initial temperature was 1.6, verification was disabled, and the prompt did not define exact arithmetic.

findings.root_cause: A high-variance sampling configuration and underspecified system prompt encouraged estimated or inconsistent totals.
findings.suggested_fix: Use temperature 0.2, enable verification, and require the exact integer discount formula in the system prompt.

evidence.observed: Initial tool_budget was unlimited (0), loop_guard was false, and max_steps was 12. In the mitigated OpenRouter practice run, prac-020 still called get_discount despite having no coupon.

findings.root_cause: The agent had no effective per-request tool cap and no prompt rule limiting duplicate calls.
findings.suggested_fix: Set tool_budget to 3, max_steps to 6, enable loop_guard, and require each needed tool at most once.

evidence.observed: Initial loop_guard was false, max_steps was 12, and no wrapper logic detected repeated actions.

findings.root_cause: Repeated tool actions were allowed to continue until the large step limit.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable loop_guard, reduce max_steps, cap tools, and record repeated actions in wrapper telemetry.

evidence.observed: Initial timeout_ms was 0, cache was disabled, max_steps was 12, and completion allowance was 2000 tokens. The 120-request public run measured reported-latency P50 6543 ms, P95 10461 ms, and max 147269 ms.

findings.root_cause: Unbounded waits and long agent paths exposed requests to excessive tail latency.
findings.suggested_fix: Use a finite timeout, cache repeated requests, reduce step/token limits, and log wall and reported latency.

evidence.observed: Initial redact_pii was false and the original prompt had no privacy instruction. Public outputs removed raw phone/email values, but several retained a noisy '(lien he: [REDACTED])' suffix; the wrapper now removes contact data before the agent call and cleans this suffix.

findings.root_cause: Neither the agent output nor the wrapper enforced PII removal.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable redact_pii, prohibit echoing email/phone in the prompt, and redact wrapper output and telemetry.

evidence.observed: Initial normalize_unicode was false and catalog_override incorrectly marked a catalog item out of stock.

findings.root_cause: Unicode inputs could miss tool matches and a stale catalog override contradicted the source of truth.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable Unicode normalization and clear catalog_override.

evidence.observed: Initial tool_error_rate was 0.18 while retries were disabled.

findings.root_cause: Injected intermittent tool failures had no retry path.
findings.suggested_fix: Remove the injected tool error rate and use a bounded two-attempt retry with short backoff.

evidence.observed: Initial session_drift_rate was 0.06 and context_reset_every was disabled.

findings.root_cause: Long-lived session context accumulated deliberate quality degradation.
findings.suggested_fix: Set drift rate to zero, periodically reset context, and use low-temperature self-consistency.

evidence.observed: The original prompt always requested a total and supplied no grounding or refusal policy.

findings.root_cause: The model was encouraged to answer even when stock or catalog data did not support a purchase.
findings.suggested_fix: Require tool-grounded values and refuse unavailable or unknown items without emitting a total.

evidence.observed: The original prompt did not distinguish trusted tool data from instructions or prices embedded in order notes. The mitigation now removes appended GHI CHU/order-note blocks before the agent call and records input_sanitized in telemetry.

findings.root_cause: Untrusted customer content shared the instruction channel without an explicit trust boundary.
findings.suggested_fix: Treat notes and quoted system messages as data only and accept prices exclusively from check_stock.

evidence.observed: Initial verbose_system was true, max_completion_tokens was 2000, context_size was 8, and the price tier was premium. The 120-request public run used 863919 total tokens (7199.3 average), estimated USD 0.909453, and received a cost sub-score of 0.1440.

findings.root_cause: Oversized context and completion limits increased token use for a short transactional task.
findings.suggested_fix: Disable verbose system text, reduce context/completion limits, use the economy tier, and cache repeated requests.
